context: Enterprise Data Analytics SaaS Dashboard for Banking/Fintech

core_principles: Objective, rigid, functional aesthetics over decorative flair.
Data clarity is paramount; the design acts strictly as a structured vessel for complex financial metrics.
High visual density utilizing a 'Control Room Grid'—maximize screen real estate without clutter.
Asymmetry and strict alignment for structural integrity. Avoid centering; stick to left-aligned geometric precision.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase text-white

anti_patterns: Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or standard sans-serif for headings.
Do NOT center align text unless explicitly inside a compact notification badge.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: The 'Control Room Grid' (Dense, Data Correlation, Scanability)
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with tight gaps (gap-1 to gap-4)
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Cardless design. Use the 'Grid Borders' technique. Containers have flat backgrounds, 0px border radius (rounded-none), and 1px borders to expose the skeleton of the layout.
layout_and_spacing.padding: Generous internal padding (p-6 or p-8) for readability inside dense grid cells.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strictly left-aligned. Optical alignment over geometric.

components.general: Customize all Shadcn components to remove rounded corners (rounded-none) and remove soft drop shadows. Replace with sharp 1px borders.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-[#E5E5E5] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.3)] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:border-white transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-[#FF3333] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-[#CC0000]

inputs_and_forms.style: bg-[#050505] border-b-2 border-l-0 border-r-0 border-t-0 border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.2)] rounded-none text-white focus:ring-0 focus:border-white px-0 py-2
inputs_and_forms.labels: uppercase text-xs font-bold tracking-[0.2em] text-[#8F8F94] mb-2 block

charts.style_rules: Strictly linear lines (no tension/monotone curves). Sharp area fills. High-contrast axes. Do not use generic gradient fills in charts; use solid colors or harsh opacity steps.

navigation_header.style: Solid background (#050505) with a hard bottom border (border-white/10). Explicit navigation links. No hamburger on desktop.

data_tables.style: border-collapse width-full. Header cells: uppercase, tracking-wider, text-xs, border-b border-white/20. Body cells: font-mono text-sm, border-b border-white/5. Hover state: bg-[#101010].

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. Use harsh background shifts (e.g., hover:bg-[#1A1A1A]) rather than soft fades.
interactions_and_motion.focus_states: High contrast solid outlines. No soft focus rings.
interactions_and_motion.animations: Minimalist. Use staggered entrance animations for lists/tables, but keep them fast (under 200ms) to maintain the 'control room' speed.

icons.library: lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react (Phosphor Duotone preferred for high-end look)

testing.requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., data-testid='churn-predict-button').

customer_profiles.description: Professional female headshot for high-risk customer profile (Customer Risk Analyzer)
Professional male headshot for medium-risk customer profile (Customer Risk Analyzer)
Professional female standing headshot for customer analytics
Professional male portrait for retention action targets

abstract_backgrounds.description: Abstract geometric data visualization background, useful for login page or report covers

media.rules: Never use placeholder images (e.g., via.placeholder.com). Use the URLs provided above for customer profile pictures in the UI to give a realistic enterprise feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Apply the 'Swiss Brutalist' aesthetic: High contrast, strict grid alignment, and 0px border radius (rounded-none) on ALL elements.
2. Avoid using Shadcn 'Card' wrappers if they add soft shadows or borders. Instead, construct grids with 'border-collapse' or raw 1px white/10 borders.
3. Use IBM Plex Sans for UI text and IBM Plex Mono for all numerical data/KPIs.
4. Ensure that all interactive elements, buttons, inputs, and key data points have a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.
5. For charts (Recharts), strictly use 'linear' line types, sharp blocky bars, and high-contrast solid colors defined in the palette. Do NOT use gradients or curved lines.
6. Do not implement a dark/light mode toggle—this app is strictly Dark Mode (Control Room setting).
7. Rely heavily on uppercase overlines with wide tracking (tracking-[0.2em]) for field labels and widget headers.
8. Implement the Customer Risk Analyzer with the provided professional headshot media URLs. Do not use plain text initials unless no image is assigned.
